'''鈭歴h-v-sh-ng''' ('''kashavshengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weaponeer|weaponeer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-v-sh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weaponeer|weaponeer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-v-sh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashavshengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishavshengoko|thishavshengoko]] || [[word:jishavshengoko|jishavshengoko]] || [[word:shishavshengoko|shishavshengoko]] || [[word:kishavshengoko|kishavshengoko]]
|-
